message:
Implement native HTTPS proxy using Zig std.http.Client + std.crypto.tls

- Replace curl subprocess with std.http.Client.fetch()
- Uses native Zig TLS (std.crypto.tls.Client) - no OpenSSL needed
- No system dependencies - pure Zig HTTP/HTTPS
- Response body streamed via ArrayList writer
- Gzip compression on responses
- Zero process spawn overhead

This proves PyAOT can compile Python HTTPS code (requests, urllib)
to native Zig without external dependencies.
